title: Fermented Malaysian Onion Crumble
description: A sweet and savory crumble dish made with fermented elements and a Malaysian twist.

ingredients.name: Malaysian spices
ingredients.notes: Mix of cumin, coriander, and turmeric

instructions: In a bowl, mix together the fermented vegetables, onion, and Malaysian spices.
Add the sugar and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
In another bowl, mix together the breadcrumbs and melted butter.
Top the mixture with the breadcrumb mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
